title: Feur Dimensional Skyland
description: New Sky Dimension for specific Feur Skyland mod
body:
/!\ You look Dimensional Skyland here, there is also FEUR Skyland which offers the same content for the overworld. Both mods are compatible with each other !

![Feur Dimensional Skyland](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c331976810e7026b287b995ff071528488f1ff8a_0.webp)



This mod adds a new dimension dedicated to the islands of the FEUR Skyland mod. 

Take advantage of this to create a new skyblock experience ! Total around 30 different islands are available and more soon !



![Skyland Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74546d0ca751840bbabd770e5639361ced663228_0.webp)

Skyland Portal is made this way with **_Glazed Green Terracotta_**

Here the craft for the portal igniter !

![Craft Igniter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe8f7799946a398a79b150d64db464cbd207b07.png)

 _( MossBlock + Emerald + Flint&Steel )_
